en.extract:
The slaty tanager (Creurgops dentatus) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Bolivia and Peru.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''slaty tanager''' ('''''Creurgops dentatus''''') is a species of bird in the family [[Thraupidae]]. It is found in [[Bolivia]] and [[Peru]].<ref name="iucn status 12 November 2021" />
Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.<ref name="iucn status 12 November 2021" />
[[File:SlatyTanager.jpg|thumb|left|Cloud forest above Cock-of-the-Rock Lodge - Peru]]
